title: Working Status - add option for Business Travel
excerpt:
Will be very helpful to add an  option for Business Travel. 
To drive greater use of this functionality, it will also be helpful to move this or offer it in more places to quicky update status.

posts.author: mzona (Marisa Zona)
posts.cookedHtml:
Will be very helpful to add an option for Business Travel.
To drive greater use of this functionality, it will also be helpful to move this or offer it in more places to quicky update status.

image554×758 46.6 KB

posts.author: smithjohn (smith)
posts.cookedHtml: Thats a great idea! Having a Business Travel option in the working status would really help teams know when someone is away but still working or available in a limited way. It adds more clarity than just marking someone as Out of Office. I have seen some teams create a custom status or use automations to show travel days but having it as a built in option would be much smoother. Do you think it should also allow setting a time range or location so others can see when and where someone is traveling?

posts.author: byteboutiquein (Raj)
posts.cookedHtml:
We built an Out of Office Assistant for monday that handles OOO coverage automatically.

What it does

  • Each user sets their OOO dates + backup once (Global setting)

  • On boards you choose: when the owner is OOO, the app posts a clear update

  • Optional auto-reassign to the backup (Hard mode)

  • If the backup isn’t a board subscriber (private board), it won’t reassign—it will only notify in updates

  • Optional @mention auto-reply with rate-limiting

Marketplace link: Out Of Office Assistant - monday.com Marketplace
